---
title: "AI Engine Plot Test"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(aisdk)
register_ai_engine()
options(aisdk.default_model = "openai:gpt-4o-mini")
```

## Test 1: Simple Plot

```{r}
# Create test data
x <- 1:10
y <- x^2
```

```{ai echo=TRUE, eval=TRUE}
Use ggplot2 to create a simple scatter plot of x vs y with a blue line connecting the points.
```

## Test 2: Base R Plot

```{ai echo=TRUE, eval=TRUE}
Create a base R plot: plot(x, y, type="b", col="red", main="Base R Plot Test")
```
